refresh_cadence: daily change detection; publish only on legal pool or stat change
records_captured: rebalanced stat values for each listed Pokémon/form

fields.name: pokemon_id
fields.description: Canonical numeric ID when directly available; null if only name/form mapping applies

fields.name: pokemon_name
fields.description: Species name as reported by OP.GG

fields.name: form_name
fields.description: OP.GG form label prior to normalization

fields.name: is_legal
fields.description: Whether the Pokémon/form is in the current legal pool

fields.name: stat_total
fields.description: Sum of the six Champions-format stats

fields.name: regulation_code
fields.description: Regulation identifier associated with this legality snapshot, if published

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Page or endpoint the record was extracted from

fields.name: dataset_version
fields.description: Dataset version this staging snapshot feeds

known_risks: Custom form labels that may not match canonical naming
